title: notodanthonia procera
intro: Notodanthonia procera, also known as the tall swamp-grass or tall club-rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and aiding in the relief of cold and flu symptoms. Notodanthonia procera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief to those suffering from respiratory issues.
